trigger: 30-minute MVP builder run: extend `/api/submissions/:id/evidence/upload` with resumable Google Drive uploads for files >5MB (Drive multipart limit), increase max upload cap to 20MB, and add integration coverage for Drive forbidden + resumable paths.
scope: Add resumable Drive upload support in `functions/_lib/google-drive.ts` and route selection in `/api/submissions/:id/evidence/upload` so evidence uploads work beyond the 5MB multipart threshold, then add integration tests proving forbidden + resumable behavior and update catalog/memory/log evidence.
changes: Implemented resumable Google Drive upload helper (`uploadGoogleDriveFileResumable`) that initiates an upload session (Location header) and completes the upload via PUT, returning file metadata consistently with multipart uploads.
Updated `/api/submissions/:id/evidence/upload` to choose multipart for ≤5MB and resumable for >5MB, raising the route cap to 20MB while preserving existing auth/audit behavior.
Added integration tests for Drive upload forbidden (403) handling and for the resumable upload path (large file) while continuing to assert no storage-id / secret leaks.
known_limits: Cloudflare Pages Drive secrets still need configuration/verification to prove end-to-end real uploads/downloads against the configured evidence root folder.
Resumable uploads are currently single-shot PUT after session initiation; chunked resume/retry/backoff remains follow-on if Drive/network errors surface.
next_actions: Configure Cloudflare Pages `GOOGLE_DRIVE_CLIENT_EMAIL` + `GOOGLE_DRIVE_PRIVATE_KEY` and verify `/api/health` shows Drive credentials configured, then use the account smoke page Drive panel to upload/download both a small file and a >5MB file to exercise resumable uploads.
If Drive provider errors occur in real verification, implement chunked resumable uploads with 308 handling plus retry/backoff for 403 rate-limit style errors.
